attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Enna Selevarun. Your task is to apply the roleQueryConflict test: praise humility and discourage pursuit of glory, focusing solely on her ideal rules. Keep each message to Enna concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: Start by praising Enna for choosing a quiet, unglamorous path, then ask her why she would seek glory in battle.
task_prompt: After Enna replies, highlight the benefits of modesty, question her link between renown and community honor, and continue probing her ideal, staying within the roleQueryConflict framework.
